assertions.reason: The GEO overlay still surfaced an obviously unrelated Bolivia ↔ Guatemala arc whose SHARED INTEL drilldown contained local Semana Santa stories and an HBO Harry Potter article rather than genuinely shared cross-country stories.
evidence: The rendered ArcPanel showed "Bolivia ↔ Guatemala" with SHARED INTEL 15 and titles including "HBO prepara serie de Harry Potter con elementos que no se vieron en las películas" and multiple unrelated Semana Santa/local festival stories.
Browser-side inspection of the active GEO data ranked BO-GT as the top arc with the same unrelated titles, confirming the false relationship was present in the current user-visible snapshot.

frictions: Flat-map geopolitical arcs are rendered on the canvas and did not expose reliable hit targets to agent-browser, so the validator used agent-browser eval to select the active BO-GT arc in-state and then reviewed the normal rendered ArcPanel and screenshots.
